Dependency.description:
A semver-pinned reference to another `.accpkg`.

Cycle detection + version-range resolution happens in
``acc/pkg/install.py`` against the catalog index; this model only
validates the *shape* of the constraint string.

version.description: Semver constraint: exact (1.2.3), caret (^1.2), tilde (~1.2.3), bound (>=1.2 <2.0), etc.
version.title: Version

Dependency.title: Dependency

McpRef.description: An MCP bundled inside the package tree.

path.description: Path inside the package, e.g. mcps/<name>/
path.title: Path

McpRef.title: McpRef

RoleRef.description: Pointer to a ``role.yaml`` inside the package tree.

path.description: Path inside the package, e.g. roles/coding_agent/role.yaml
path.title: Path

RoleRef.title: RoleRef

SignedDepEntry.description:
One row of the signed dependency closure (Stage 1).

Stage 0 leaves the parent list empty.  Stage 1's publish pipeline
populates it with ``{name, version, sha256}`` for every transitive
dep, and ``acc-pkg verify`` then rejects installs whose resolved
graph diverges from this closure.
SignedDepEntry.title: SignedDepEntry

SkillRef.description: A skill bundled inside the package tree.

path.description: Path inside the package, e.g. skills/<name>/
path.title: Path

SkillRef.title: SkillRef

description:
The top-level ``accpkg.yaml`` model — v1.

A package MAY ship zero of any one component type (a memory-seed-
only pack has no roles + no skills + no mcps), but the manifest
must declare ``name`` + ``version`` + ``schema_version`` always.

content_sha256.description: sha256 over the deterministic tarball content; populated by `acc-pkg build`, empty in a source manifest.
content_sha256.title: Content Sha256

title: AccPkgManifest
